title: Performance Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: German C1 minimum (mind. C1) — written and spoken
missing_skills: German C1 — CV shows B1+ (hard requirement)
Paid media management hands-on (Meta, Google Ads, YouTube)
core_responsibilities: Manage five-digit daily budgets on paid channels (Meta, Instagram, Google, YouTube)
Create and optimize campaign setups continuously
Analyse and optimize customer journey of 1M+ annual users
Daily creative A/B testing and performance feedback
Direct contact with Facebook and Google account managers
recommended_emphasis: German B1+ is below the C1 minimum hard requirement — this is a significant blocker
No hands-on paid media management experience in CV
Dresden on-site is a location constraint
Score is above 30 but barely — consider discussing with user whether to proceed

company_info.size_raw: young tech and marketing company, implied small team
